3067310.name: Salarybot Shuffle
3067310.description:
Salarybot Shuffle is an arcade action platformer that attempts to simulate the feeling of a full-time job collecting recalled products. Take control of an incredibly powerful Salarybot as you try to meet your quotas as a remote employee for the Technology Weapons & Technology Company.

While the Salarybots have almost infinite durability, you don't have infinite time. You'll need to use your time wisely to ensure it's still worth it for the company to keep you deployed. Explore different ships with randomized items, enemies, and rewards each run.

Dash, strike, jump, launch, juggle, wall slide, and parry your way through a number of different enemies and challenges designed to test your ability to move quickly and think on your robot feet.

Compete for employee of the month with up to 3 additional friends online with rollback netcode.
3067310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
